1120901.name: Endless Nightmares
1120901.desc:
- Combat Start: gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] and 1 [Vulnerable] for every 5 SP difference between Combat Start and the last Turn Start (max 5)
- Deal +1% damage for every [Sinking] Potency on target (max 20%)

1120911.name: Endless Nightmares
1120911.desc:
- Combat Start: gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] and 1 [Vulnerable] for every 5 SP difference between Combat Start and the last Turn Start (max 5)
- Deal +2% damage for every [Sinking] Potency on target (max 40%)

1120921.desc: Combat Start: 1 ally with the least SP loses 7 SP, then gains 1 [AzureDamageUp]
